content.json:
# 🩺 SOC Health & Coverage
---
The SOC is blind when a connector silently fails. This workbook tracks data source ingestion health, agent connectivity, Sentinel connector status, and ingestion latency. A silent failure here means missed detections across every other workbook.

content.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, OSType, ComputerEnvironment
| summarize
    TotalAgents = count(),
    OnlineAgents = countif(LastHeartbeat > ago(15m)),
    WarningAgents = countif(LastHeartbeat between (ago(1h) .. ago(15m))),
    OfflineAgents = countif(LastHeartbeat < ago(1h))
| project TotalAgents, OnlineAgents, WarningAgents, OfflineAgents
content.title: Agent health summary

content.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, OSType, ComputerEnvironment, Version
| extend Status = case(
    LastHeartbeat > ago(15m), 'Online',
    LastHeartbeat > ago(1h), 'Warning',
    'Offline'
)
| where Status != 'Online'
| project Computer, OSType, ComputerEnvironment, Status, LastHeartbeat, Version
| sort by LastHeartbeat asc
content.title: Agents not recently seen — warning or offline

content.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize AgentCount = dcount(Computer) by OSType, ComputerEnvironment
| sort by AgentCount desc
content.title: Agent distribution by OS and environment

content.query:
SentinelHealth
| where SentinelResourceType == 'Data connector'
| summarize LastEvent = max(TimeGenerated), LastStatus = arg_max(TimeGenerated, Status) by SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceKind
| project SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceKind, LastStatus = tostring(LastStatus.Status), LastEvent
| sort by LastEvent asc
content.title: Connector health — last status per connector

content.query:
SentinelHealth
| where SentinelResourceType == 'Data connector'
| where Status == 'Failure'
| project TimeGenerated, SentinelResourceName, SentinelResourceKind, Reason, Description
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 20
content.title: Connector failures

content.query:
union withsource=TableName
    (CommonSecurityLog | summarize EventCount = count() by TableName = 'CommonSecurityLog', bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)),
    (Syslog | summarize EventCount = count() by TableName = 'Syslog', bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)),
    (SecurityEvent | summarize EventCount = count() by TableName = 'SecurityEvent', bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)),
    (W3CIISLog | summarize EventCount = count() by TableName = 'W3CIISLog', bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)),
    (AzureActivity | summarize EventCount = count() by TableName = 'AzureActivity', bin(TimeGenerated, 1h))
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Ingestion volume per table over time

content.query:
let Tables = datatable(TableName: string)[
    'CommonSecurityLog', 'Syslog', 'SecurityEvent', 'W3CIISLog',
    'AzureActivity', 'AuditLogs', 'SigninLogs', 'Heartbeat'
];
Tables
| extend LastSeen = toscalar(
    union withsource=T
        (CommonSecurityLog | where TableName == 'CommonSecurityLog' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (Syslog | where TableName == 'Syslog' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (SecurityEvent | where TableName == 'SecurityEvent' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (W3CIISLog | where TableName == 'W3CIISLog' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (AzureActivity | where TableName == 'AzureActivity' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (AuditLogs | where TableName == 'AuditLogs' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (SigninLogs | where TableName == 'SigninLogs' | summarize max(TimeGenerated)),
        (Heartbeat | where TableName == 'Heartbeat' | summarize max(TimeGenerated))
    | summarize max(Column1)
)
content.title: Last event received per key table
